zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理结构
zh.content:
当前SOLUSD整体呈震荡偏弱结构，价格运行在68美元下方，短线动能略显不足，市场缺乏明确方向，以整理为主整体偏空但未破关键支撑位震荡延续整理结构

MACD处于零轴下方并维持负值，动能柱偏弱，说明空头动能仍占优势；均线方面价格跌破20日均线68.29，短期承压明显反弹受限偏弱延续观望中

下方支撑位关注67.38及66.80区域，上方阻力位在68.30与69.00附近，若无法站稳均线则仍有回测风险短线以区间震荡为主观望

操作上建议保持谨慎偏空思路，未有效突破68.3前不宜追多，可等待反弹至阻力区分批布局空单，同时严格控制止损在69上方风险可控执行为

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana is currently trading in a very tight consolidation band around 67.58, showing minimal volatility with a 24h range between 67.38 and 67.62. This compression suggests market indecision after a mild recovery attempt. Despite the slight 0.28% daily gain, price action remains capped below the 20-period SMA at 68.29, indicating that short-term momentum is still leaning neutral-to-bearish rather than confirming a sustained bullish reversal.

From an indicator standpoint, the MACD reading at -0.1047 reinforces weak momentum, as price continues to struggle with upward expansion. The absence of RSI data limits overbought/oversold confirmation, but the inability to reclaim the SMA(20) typically signals that sellers are still active on rallies. Until MACD begins flattening or crossing above its signal line, upside follow-through remains technically constrained.

Key support is forming near 67.30, which aligns closely with the recent session low and acts as the immediate defense zone. A breakdown below this level could expose a slide toward 66.80, where prior liquidity pockets may attract buyers. On the upside, the first meaningful resistance sits at 68.30, followed by a stronger supply zone near 69.00, where prior rejections have occurred.

In terms of strategy, short-term traders may prefer range-bound approaches, fading moves toward resistance while maintaining tight risk controls above 68.30. Breakout traders should wait for a decisive close above the SMA(20) with improving MACD momentum before targeting higher levels. Until then, price action favors cautious positioning with a slight bearish bias unless support holds firmly and momentum improves.
